messages.subject: June corporate trip - holding off
messages.body: Captain, we have not sent the deposit for the June 12 trip and cannot commit yet. Please treat BK2027-30 as unconfirmed for now.

messages.subject: Outing postponed to 2028
messages.body: We are postponing the office outing to next year. Please release BK2027-31, no deposit is coming this season.
